title: Harris Essentials Walls & Ceilings Paint Brushes, 3 Brush Pack, 1", 1.5", 2"
features: Synthetic filament for an even flow of water-based paint
Comfortable easy grip handle for extended painting sessions
Three brush sizes (1", 1.5", and 2") for versatility in painting projects
Ideal for use with emulsion paints on interior walls and ceilings
Easy to clean with warm soapy water and maintain with proper drying techniques
description: From the manufacturer Choosing the right Harris product for your decorating task has never been easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. Harris Essentials Walls & Ceilings Paint Brushes, 3 Brush Pack, 1", 1.5", 2" For painting on interior flat walls and ceilings The Harris Essentials Walls & Ceilings Paint Brushes set includes three brushes in 1", 1.5", and 2" sizes, perfect for tackling any painting project on interior flat walls and ceilings. The soft synthetic filament retains water-based paint for an even flow and professional-looking finish, while the comfortable easy grip handle makes extended painting sessions a breeze. Don't settle for anything less, upgrade your painting experience with the Harris Essentials Walls & Ceilings Paint Brushes set. Set Contains: 1", 1.5", 2" Paint Brushes Upgrade your painting experience This set includes 1", 1.5", and 2" brushes, providing you with the tools you need to tackle any painting project with ease. With their soft synthetic filament, these brushes retain water-based paint for an even flow and a professional-looking finish. The comfortable, easy grip handle makes it perfect for those long painting sessions. Perfect for interior walls & ceilings These brushes are ideal for use with emulsion paints on interior flat walls and ceilings. Simply rinse the brush head before use to remove any dust and after painting, clean the brush by removing excess paint and washing it in warm soapy water. Once cleaned, let the brush dry naturally with the head flat for best results. For those tricky spots Say goodbye to the hassle of painting around tricky areas like plug sockets and light switches, and get the job done quickly and efficiently with the Harris Essentials Walls & Ceilings Paint Brushes. Q: What is included in the Harris Essentials Walls & Ceilings Paint Brushes set? A: The set includes three brushes with sizes of 1", 1.5", and 2". Q: What type of paint is the set suitable for? A : The brushes are designed for use with water-based emulsion paints. Q: Can these brushes be used for painting on walls and ceilings? A: Yes, the brushes are specifically designed for use on interior flat walls and ceilings. Q: What is the filament material used in the brush heads? A: The brush heads are made of soft synthetic filament. Q: Can the brushes be easily cleaned? A: Yes, the brushes can be easily cleaned by removing excess paint and washing them in warm soapy water. Q: Where are the paintbrushes best used? A: The brushes are perfect for painting in tight spaces like around plug sockets and light switches . Q: Why should I choose Harris Essentials Walls & Ceilings Paint Brushes over other sets? A: The set offers three brush sizes, synthetic filament for an even paint flow, a comfortable handle, easy cleaning, making it a versatile and convenient choice for all your painting needs. Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort. Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier.
